experience.title: Technical Support Engineer
experience.name: FSQ
listItems: Providing technical support for AWS-based marketing products, including investigating issues, troubleshooting, and developing automation scripts and production tools to resolve client-facing challenges.
Guiding multiple B2B customers through onboarding and deployment processes by simplifying technical workflows and ensuring seamless adoption of our products.
Collaborating in client-facing meetings to translate technical concepts into actionable steps, helping non-technical stakeholders make decisions based on technical translated knowledge.
Building and maintaining technical documentation, thus enabling faster knowledge transfer across internal and external teams.
Leading training sessions for new features with Account Managers.
Automating repetitive support processes, reducing operational overhead and enabling client-facing teams to focus on revenue and customer success tasks during their working day.
Leading the implementation of internal tools so GTM teams can cross-sell products when facing customers.

experience.title: AutoPay CX Analyst
experience.name: NCR
experience.description: SMB Payment coordination and Progress Reporting
listItems: Delivered onboarding and support for SMB clients, resolving billing and payment issues while ensuring a positive customer experience.
Produced weekly trend reports and actionable insights, optimizing workflows and enabling data-driven improvements in client engagement.
Authored documentation that standardized processes across global teams, ensuring consistent client communication and efficient support handoffs.

experience.title: Fire Protection Design Engineer
experience.name: ETS
experience.description: Designing Hydraulic and Electronic Fire Protection systems for Industrial Businesses
listItems: Managed 50+ client design projects, guiding customers through project requirements and ensuring regulatory compliance from design to delivery.
Translated complex technical and regulatory requirements into accessible guidelines that supported client onboarding and adoption of new fire protection systems.
Authored reference material and compliance documentation, improving client understanding and accelerating sales timelines.
